L254440L254441L254442L254443L254444L254445L254446L254447L254448L254449
let K, add, mul, n; assume hn; let p; assume hp; let r; assume hr; let A; assume hA; let b; assume hb, hField, hrn, hrp, hRank, hLeadingMinor;
L254480
have h_s23_t11_leading_system_invertible: \({{A}[{\lambda i,\;i},{\lambda j,\;j}]}\in\operatorname{GL}({r},{K})\);
proof from hA, hrn, hrp, hr, hField, hLeadingMinor (3 steps)
statement: invertible_matrix K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A);
L254485L254488
have hLeadingMatrixIn: \({{A}[{\lambda i,\;i},{\lambda j,\;j}]} \in {M_{{r}}({K})}\) by lam_Pi from hA, hrn, hrp;
formal
statement: matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A ∈ square_matrix_ring K r;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (r ⨯ r) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1)) (λu hu ⇒ ap_Pi (n ⨯ p) (λv ⇒ K) A (u 0,u 1) hA (tuple_2_setprod n p (u 0) (hrn (u 0) (andEL (u 0 ∈ r) (u 1 ∈ r) (setprod_elim_0_1 r r u hu))) (u 1) (hrp (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ r) (u 1 ∈ r) (setprod_elim_0_1 r r u hu))))));
L254501
thus thesis by s23_theorem8_corollary1_matrix_invertible_iff_determinant_nonzero from hr, hLeadingMatrixIn, hField, hLeadingMinor;
formal
exact (iffER (invertible_matrix K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A)) (matrix_determinant K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A) ≠ ring_zero K add) (god1_s23_theorem8_corollary1_matrix_invertible_iff_determinant_nonzero K add mul r hr (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A) hLeadingMatrixIn hField) hLeadingMinor);
end;
L254512L254515
have h_s23_t11_leading_matrix_in: \({{A}[{\lambda i,\;i},{\lambda j,\;j}]} \in {M_{{r}}({K})}\) by lam_Pi from hA, hrn, hrp;
formal
statement: matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A ∈ square_matrix_ring K r;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (r ⨯ r) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1)) (λu hu ⇒ ap_Pi (n ⨯ p) (λv ⇒ K) A (u 0,u 1) hA (tuple_2_setprod n p (u 0) (hrn (u 0) (andEL (u 0 ∈ r) (u 1 ∈ r) (setprod_elim_0_1 r r u hu))) (u 1) (hrp (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ r) (u 1 ∈ r) (setprod_elim_0_1 r r u hu))))));
L254547L254561
have h_s23_t11_s20_section5_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall n0,p0,r0\in \omega,\;\forall A0\in \operatorname{Mat}_{{n0}\times {p0}}({K0}),\;\forall b0\in {K0}^{{n0}},\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a field} \to {r0} \subseteq {n0} \to {r0} \subseteq {p0} \to {\operatorname{rank}({A0})} = {r0} \to {\det({{A0}[{\lambda i,\;i},{\lambda j,\;j}]})} \neq {0_{{K0}}} \to \exists y\in {K0}^{{p0}},\;{A0}{y}={b0} \to \exists x\in {K0}^{{p0}},\;{{A0}{x}={b0}} \land {\forall k\in p0,\;{k} \notin {r0} \to {x\left(k\right)} = {0_{{K0}}}}\) by s20_section5_zero_free_variables;
formal
statement: ∀K0, ∀add0 mul0 : set → set → set, ∀n0 p0 r0 ∈ ω, ∀A0 ∈ matrix_space K0 n0 p0, ∀b0 ∈ K0n0, field K0 add0 mul0 → r0 ⊆ n0 → r0 ⊆ p0 → linear_system_rank K0 add0 mul0 n0 p0 A0 = r0 → matrix_determinant K0 add0 mul0 r0 (matrix_submatrix r0 r0 (λi ⇒ i) (λj ⇒ j) A0) ≠ ring_zero K0 add0 → (∃y ∈ K0p0, linear_system_solution K0 add0 mul0 n0 p0 A0 b0 y) → ∃x ∈ K0p0, linear_system_solution K0 add0 mul0 n0 p0 A0 b0 x ∧ ∀k ∈ p0, k ∉ r0 → x k = ring_zero K0 add0;
proof term: apply god1_s20_section5_zero_free_variables_interface;
L254562L254567
have h_s23_t11_solution_with_zero_free_variables: \(\exists y\in {K}^{{p}},\;{A}{y}={b} \to \exists x\in {K}^{{p}},\;{{A}{x}={b}} \land {\forall k\in p,\;{k} \notin {r} \to {x\left(k\right)} = {0_{{K}}}}\) by h_s23_t11_s20_section5_formal_call from hn, hp, hr, hA, hb, hField, hrn, hrp, hRank, hLeadingMinor;
formal
statement: (∃y ∈ Kp, linear_system_solution K add mul n p A b y) → ∃x ∈ Kp, linear_system_solution K add mul n p A b x ∧ ∀k ∈ p, k ∉ r → x k = ring_zero K add;
proof term: exact (h_s23_t11_s20_section5_formal_call K add mul n hn p hp r hr A hA b hb hField hrn hrp hRank hLeadingMinor);
L254616
have h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in: \(\forall j\in n,\;{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]} \in {M_{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}({K})}\);
proof from hA, hrn, hrp, hb (3 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc r);

let j; assume hj;
L254621
thus thesis by lam_Pi from hA, hrn, hrp, hb, hj;
formal
exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ if u 0 ∈ r then if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0) else if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j (u 1) else b j) (λu hu ⇒ orE (u 0 ∈ r) (u 0 ∉ r) (xm (u 0 ∈ r)) ((if u 0 ∈ r then if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0) else if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j (u 1) else b j) ∈ K) (λhu0 ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (if u 1 ∈ r 0)) ∈ K) (λhu1 ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1)) (if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0)) (If_i_1 (u 1 ∈ r) (matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1)) (b (u 0)) hu1) (ap_Pi (n ⨯ p) (λz ⇒ K) A (u 0,u 1) hA (tuple_2_setprod n p (u 0) (hrn (u 0) hu0) (u 1) (hrp (u 1) hu1)))) (λhnu1 ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (b (u 0)) (if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0)) (If_i_0 (u 1 ∈ r) then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0) else if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j (u 1) else b j) (If_i_0 (u 0 ∈ r) (if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0)) (if u 1 ∈ r then (b j) (if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j (u 1) else b j) (If_i_0 (u 1 ∈ r) (matrix_entry A j (u 1)) (b j) hnu1) (ap_Pi n (λz ⇒ K) b j hb hj))))));
end;
L254720
have h_s23_t11_augmented_homogeneous_system: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to {{\det({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]})} = {0_{{K}}}} \leftrightarrow {\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}}\);
proof from hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in, hField (5 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add ↔ ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add));
L254729L254730
let j; assume hj, hntr;
L254731L254738
have hHomogeneousCriterion: \({\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}} \leftrightarrow {{\det({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]})} = {0_{{K}}}}\) by s23_theorem8_corollary3_homogeneous_square_system from hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in, hj, hField;
formal
statement: ((∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) ↔ matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add);
proof term: exact (god1_s23_theorem8_corollary3_homogeneous_square_system K add mul (ordsucc r) (omega_ordsucc r hr) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in j hj) hField);
L254742
thus thesis by iffI from hHomogeneousCriterion;
formal
exact (iffI (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) (iffER (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) hHomogeneousCriterion) (iffEL (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) hHomogeneousCriterion));
end;
L254775
have h_s23_t11_affine_solution_homogenizes: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to \forall x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}} \to \exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta\left(r\right)} = {-{1_{{K}}}}}} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}\);
proof from hField, hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in (56 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → ∀x ∈ Kr, (∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) → ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul) ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add);
L254787L254788L254789L254790
let j; assume hj, hntr; let x; assume hx, hAffine;
L254791L254792
have hDivision: \(({K},{add},{mul})\text{ is a division ring}\) by field_division_ring from hField;
L254793L254794
have hRing: \(({K},{add},{mul})\text{ is a ring}\) by division_ring_ring from hDivision;
L254795L254796
have hAddGroup: \(({K},{add})\text{ is a group}\) by ring_additive_group from hRing;
L254797L254798
have hComm: \(\forall x,y\in {K},\ {mul}(x,y)={mul}(y,x)\) by field_multiplication_commutative from hField;
L254799L254800
have hOneIn: \({1_{{K}}} \in {K}\) by ring_multiplicative_identity_specification from hRing;
formal
statement: ring_one K mul ∈ K;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring_one K mul ∈ K) (∀q ∈ K, mul q (ring_one K mul) = q ∧ mul (ring_one K mul) q = q) (god1_ring_multiplicative_identity_specification K add mul hRing));
L254805L254806
have hNegOneIn: \({-{1_{{K}}}} \in {K}\) by group_inverse_in from hAddGroup, hOneIn;
formal
statement: ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_group_inverse_in K add hAddGroup (ring_one K mul) hOneIn);
L254808
have hEtaValues: \(\forall k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{\operatorname{if}\;{k} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(k\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}} \in {K}\);
proof from hx, hNegOneIn (3 steps)
statement: ∀k ∈ ordsucc r, (if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∈ K;
L254811L254812
let k; assume hk;
L254813
thus thesis by orE from hx, hNegOneIn;
formal
exact (orE (k ∈ r) (k ∉ r) (xm (k ∈ r)) ((if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∈ K) (λhkr ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (x k) (if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (If_i_1 (k ∈ r) (x k) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hkr) (ap_Pi r (λq ⇒ K) x k hx hkr)) (λhnkr ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (If_i_0 (k ∈ r) (x k) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hnkr) hNegOneIn));
end;
L254829L254834
have hEtaIn: \({\lambda k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{k} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(k\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}} \in {{K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}}\) by lam_Pi from hEtaValues;
formal
statement: (λk ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∈ Kordsucc r;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ K) (λk ⇒ if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hEtaValues);
L254838
have hEtaOld: \(\forall k\in r,\;{\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(k\right)} = {x\left(k\right)}\);
proof (3 steps)
statement: ∀k ∈ r, (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k = x k;
L254842L254843
let k; assume hkr;
L254844
thus thesis by transitivity from hkr;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k) (if k ∈ r then x k else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (x k) (beta (ordsucc r) (λq ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k (ordsuccI1 r k hkr)) (If_i_1 (k ∈ r) (x k) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hkr));
end;
L254857L254862
have hEtaLast: \({\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(r\right)} = {-{1_{{K}}}}\) by transitivity from hr;
formal
statement: (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul);
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r) (if r ∈ r then x r else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (beta (ordsucc r) (λq ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r (ordsuccI2 r)) (If_i_0 (r ∈ r) (x r) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (nat_not_in_self r (omega_nat_p r hr))));
L254876
have hEquations: \(\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{\sum_{i\in {{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in, hj, hr, hEtaOld, hAffine, hEtaLast, hComm, hNegOneIn, hRing, hAddGroup (15 steps)
statement: ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k)) = ring_zero K add;
L254884L254885
let i; assume hi;
L254886L254888

L254889L254891
have hLastCoefficient: \({{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}} \in {K}\) by ap_Pi from hAugmentedIn, hi;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r ∈ K;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi (ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r) (λu ⇒ K) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (i,r) hAugmentedIn (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) i hi r (ordsuccI2 r)));
L254895L254905
have hOldSumCongruence: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hr, hEtaOld;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k)) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (x k));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k)) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (x k)) (λk hk ⇒ f_eq_i (λscalar ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) scalar) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k) (x k) (hEtaOld k hk)));
L254920L254928
have hOldSumEqualsLast: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}\) by transitivity from hOldSumCongruence, hAffine, hi;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k)) = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k))) (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x) (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hOldSumCongruence (hAffine i hi));
L254939L254946
have hLastProduct: \({mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(r\right)\right)} = {-{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}}\) by transitivity using ring_minus_one_multiplication_left from hEtaLast, hComm, hLastCoefficient, hNegOneIn, hRing;
formal
statement: mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r) = ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r);
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r)) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul))) (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) (f_eq_i (λscalar ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) scalar) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hEtaLast) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul))) (mul (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) (hComm (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hLastCoefficient (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hNegOneIn) (god1_ring_minus_one_multiplication_left K add mul hRing (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hLastCoefficient)));
L254976L254981
have hLastCancellation: \({add\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},-{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}\right)} = {0_{{K}}}\) by group_inverse_specification from hAddGroup, hLastCoefficient;
formal
statement: add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) = ring_zero K add;
proof term: exact (andER (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ∈ K ∧ add (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) = ring_zero K add) (add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) = ring_zero K add) (god1_group_inverse_specification K add hAddGroup (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hLastCoefficient));
L254996
thus thesis by transitivity using ring_finite_sum_natural_successor from hr, hOldSumEqualsLast, hLastProduct, hLastCancellation;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k))) (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r))) (ring_zero K add) (god1_ring_finite_sum_natural_successor K add r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k))) (eq_i_tra (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r))) (add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r))) (ring_zero K add) (god1_binary_operation_congruence add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) k))) (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r)) (ring_negation K add (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r)) hOldSumEqualsLast hLastProduct) hLastCancellation));
end;
L255081
have hEtaNonzero: \({\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}} \neq {\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hEtaLast, hAddGroup, hOneIn, hDivision (8 steps)
statement: (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ≠ (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add);
L255086
assume hEtaZero;
L255087L255092
have hEtaEvaluation: \({\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\right)\left(r\right)} = {\left(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}\right)\left(r\right)}\) by substitution from hEtaZero;
formal
statement: (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r = (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add) r;
proof term: exact (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ q r) (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add) hEtaZero);
L255097L255099
have hNegOneZero: \({-{1_{{K}}}} = {0_{{K}}}\) by transitivity from hEtaLast, hEtaEvaluation;
formal
statement: ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul) = ring_zero K add;

L255118L255119
have hOneZero: \({1_{{K}}} = {0_{{K}}}\) by transitivity using group_inverse_involutive from hAddGroup, hOneIn, hNegOneZero;
formal
statement: ring_one K mul = ring_zero K add;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (ring_one K mul) (ring_negation K add (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul))) (ring_zero K add) (eq_sym (ring_negation K add (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul))) (ring_one K mul) (god1_group_inverse_involutive K add hAddGroup (ring_one K mul) hOneIn)) (eq_i_tra (ring_negation K add (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul))) (ring_negation K add (ring_zero K add)) (ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ ring_negation K add z) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (ring_zero K add) hNegOneZero) (god1_group_inverse_identity K add hAddGroup)));
L255139
thus thesis by division_ring_one_ne_zero from hDivision, hOneZero;
formal
exact ((god1_division_ring_one_ne_zero K add mul hDivision) hOneZero);
end;
L255140
thus thesis by witness \(\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}\) from hEtaIn, h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in, hj, hEquations, hEtaLast, hEtaNonzero;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λeta ⇒ eta ∈ Kordsucc r ∧ ((homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add))) (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (andI ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∈ Kordsucc r) ((homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∧ (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∧ (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hEtaIn (andI (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∧ (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) (andI (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul))) ((λq ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ if q ∈ r then x q else ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hEtaSolution hEtaLast) hEtaNonzero)));

hEtaSolution: \({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{\lambda q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;\operatorname{if}\;{q} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;x\left(q\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;-{1_{{K}}}}=0\) by h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in, hj, hEtaIn, hEquations (conjunction assembly);
end;
L255197
have h_s23_t11_zero_last_coordinate_gives_leading_kernel_core: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to \forall eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0 \to {eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}} \to {eta\left(r\right)} = {0_{{K}}} \to \exists z\in {K}^{{r}},\;{{{A}[{\lambda i,\;i},{\lambda k,\;k}]}{z}=0} \land {{z} \neq {\lambda i\in r,\;0_{{K}}}}\);
proof from hField, h_s23_t11_augmented_matrix_in, hr, h_s23_t11_leading_matrix_in (75 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → ∀eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta → eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add) → eta r = ring_zero K add → ∃z ∈ Kr, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λk ⇒ k) A) z ∧ z ≠ (λi ∈ r ⇒ ring_zero K add);

L255213L255214
have hRing: \(({K},{add},{mul})\text{ is a ring}\) by division_ring_ring from hDivision;
L255215L255216
have hAddGroup: \(({K},{add})\text{ is a group}\) by ring_additive_group from hRing;
L255217L255219

L255220L255221
have hRestrictionIn: \({\lambda k\in r,\;eta\left(k\right)} \in {{K}^{{r}}}\) by lam_Pi from heta;
formal
statement: (λk ∈ r ⇒ eta k) ∈ Kr;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi r (λk ⇒ K) (λk ⇒ eta k) (λk hk ⇒ ap_Pi (ordsucc r) (λq ⇒ K) eta k heta (ordsuccI1 r k hk)));
L255227L255229
have hZeroSuccIn: \({\lambda k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}} \in {{K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}}\) by group_identity_in from hAddGroup;
formal
statement: (λk ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add) ∈ Kordsucc r;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ K) (λk ⇒ ring_zero K add) (λk hk ⇒ god1_group_identity_in K add hAddGroup));
L255232
have hRestrictionNonzero: \({\lambda k\in r,\;eta\left(k\right)} \neq {\lambda k\in r,\;0_{{K}}}\);

L255234
assume hRestrictionZero;
L255235
have hEtaZero: \({eta} = {\lambda k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}\);

apply extensionality from heta, hZeroSuccIn;

let i; assume hi;
L255241
thus thesis by orE from hi, hRestrictionZero, hEtaLastZero;
formal

thus thesis by hEtaNonzero from hEtaZero;

statement: ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k)) = ring_zero K add;

proof (11 steps)
statement: ∀i ∈ r, ∀k ∈ r, matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k = matrix_entry A i k;

let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;

have hPair: \({\left(i,k\right)} \in {{{r} \cup \{{r}\}} \times {{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hi, hk;
formal
statement: (i,k) ∈ ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) i (ordsuccI1 r i hi) k (ordsuccI1 r k hk));

have hPairFirstIn: \({\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(0\right)} \in {r}\) by substitution from hi;

statement: (i,k) 0 ∈ r;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL r i ((i,k) 0) (tuple_2_0_eq i k) hi);

statement: (i,k) 1 ∈ r;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL r k ((i,k) 1) (tuple_2_1_eq i k) hk);

thus thesis by transitivity from hPair, hPairFirstIn, hPairSecondIn;
formal

end;

statement: ∀i ∈ r, ∀k ∈ r, matrix_entry (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) i k = matrix_entry A i k;

thus thesis by ring_multiplicative_law from hRing, hAugmentedIn, hi, hk, heta;

exact (god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul hRing (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (ap_Pi (ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r) (λu ⇒ K) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (i,k) hAugmentedIn (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) i (ordsuccI1 r i hi) k (ordsuccI1 r k hk))) (eta k) (ap_Pi (ordsucc r) (λq ⇒ K) eta k heta (ordsuccI1 r k hk)));
end;

formal
statement: add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) (ring_zero K add) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k));

have hFullSumAsOld: \({\sum_{i\in {{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)}_i}\) by transitivity using ring_finite_sum_natural_successor from hr, hLastTermZero, hOldPlusZero;

formal
statement: ((∃z ∈ Kr, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λk ⇒ k) A) z ∧ z ≠ (λi ∈ r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) ↔ matrix_determinant K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λk ⇒ k) A) = ring_zero K add);
proof term: exact (god1_s23_theorem8_corollary3_homogeneous_square_system K add mul r hr (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λk ⇒ k) A) h_s23_t11_leading_matrix_in hField);

thus thesis by hLeadingMinor from hLeadingCriterion, hLeadingKernel;
formal
exact (hLeadingMinor (iffEL (∃z ∈ Kr, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λk ⇒ k) A) z ∧ z ≠ (λi ∈ r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) (matrix_determinant K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λi ⇒ i) (λk ⇒ k) A) = ring_zero K add) hLeadingCriterion hLeadingKernel));
end;
L255786
have h_s23_t11_normalized_coordinates_solve_affine_system: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to \forall eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0 \to {eta\left(r\right)} \neq {0_{{K}}} \to \exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}\);

statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → ∀eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta → eta r ≠ ring_zero K add → ∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r;

have hOldSumIn: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)}_i} \in {K}\) by ring_finite_sum_in_natural from hRing, hr, hEtaTermValues;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k)) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_in_natural K add mul hRing r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k)) hEtaTermValues);
L255904L255906
have hLastCoefficient: \({{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}} \in {K}\) by ap_Pi from hAugmentedIn, hi;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r ∈ K;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi (ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r) (λu ⇒ K) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) (i,r) hAugmentedIn (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) i hi r (ordsuccI2 r)));
L255910L255913
have hLastTermIn: \({mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)} \in {K}\) by ring_multiplicative_law from hRing, hLastCoefficient, hEtaR;
formal
statement: mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul hRing (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hLastCoefficient (eta r) hEtaR);
L255916L255925
have hOldPlusLastZero: \({add\left(\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)}_i,mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)\right)} = {0_{{K}}}\) by transitivity using ring_finite_sum_natural_successor from hr, hEtaEquations, hi;
formal
statement: add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r)) = ring_zero K add;

L255955L255958
have hNegLastTermIn: \({-{mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)}} \in {K}\) by group_inverse_in from hAddGroup, hLastTermIn;
formal
statement: ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r)) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_group_inverse_in K add hAddGroup (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r)) hLastTermIn);
L255961L255969
have hNegLastPlusLastZero: \({add\left(-{mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)},mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)\right)} = {0_{{K}}}\) by group_inverse_specification from hAddGroup, hLastTermIn;
formal
statement: add (ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r)) = ring_zero K add;

L256001L256009
have hOldEqualsNegLast: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {-{mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)}}\) by group_right_cancel from hAddGroup, hOldSumIn, hNegLastTermIn, hLastTermIn, hOldPlusLastZero, hNegLastPlusLastZero;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k)) = ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r));
proof term: exact (god1_group_right_cancel K add hAddGroup (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) hOldSumIn (ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) hNegLastTermIn (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r)) hLastTermIn (eq_i_tra (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) (ring_zero K add) (add (ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) hOldPlusLastZero (eq_sym (add (ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r))) (ring_zero K add) hNegLastPlusLastZero)));
L256043L256050
have hNegOldEqualsLast: \({-{\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)}_i}} = {mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}},eta\left(r\right)\right)}\) by transitivity using group_inverse_involutive from hOldEqualsNegLast, hAddGroup, hLastTermIn;
formal
statement: ring_negation K add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) = mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r);

L256073
have hAffineTermCongruence: \(\forall k\in r,\;{mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},\left(\lambda q\in r,\;mul\left(-{eta\left(q\right)},{eta\left(r\right)}^{-1}\right)\right)\left(k\right)\right)} = {mul\left(-{mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)},{eta\left(r\right)}^{-1}\right)}\);
proof from heta, hAddGroup, hRing, hCoefficientValues, hInverseIn (7 steps)
statement: ∀k ∈ r, mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ r ⇒ mul (ring_negation K add (eta q)) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r))) k) = mul (ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r));
L256082L256083
let k; assume hk;
L256084L256085
have hEtaK: \({eta\left(k\right)} \in {K}\) by ap_Pi from heta, hk;
formal
statement: eta k ∈ K;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi (ordsucc r) (λq ⇒ K) eta k heta (ordsuccI1 r k hk));
L256087L256088
have hNegEtaK: \({-{eta\left(k\right)}} \in {K}\) by group_inverse_in from hAddGroup, hEtaK;
formal
statement: ring_negation K add (eta k) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_group_inverse_in K add hAddGroup (eta k) hEtaK);
L256089
thus thesis by transitivity using ring_multiplicative_associative from hk, hRing, hCoefficientValues, hNegEtaK, hInverseIn, hEtaK;
formal

end;
L256139L256151
have hAffineSumCongruence: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},\left(\lambda q\in r,\;mul\left(-{eta\left(q\right)},{eta\left(r\right)}^{-1}\right)\right)\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left(-{mul\left({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}},eta\left(k\right)\right)},{eta\left(r\right)}^{-1}\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hr, hAffineTermCongruence;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) ((λq ∈ r ⇒ mul (ring_negation K add (eta q)) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r))) k)) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k))) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r)));

formal
statement: ∀k ∈ r, ring_negation K add (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k)) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (λk hk ⇒ god1_group_inverse_in K add hAddGroup (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (eta k)) (hEtaTermValues k hk));

formal

formal

formal
statement: mul (mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (eta r)) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r)) = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r;

thus thesis by witness \(\lambda k\in r,\;mul\left(-{eta\left(k\right)},{eta\left(r\right)}^{-1}\right)\) from hAffineVector, hAffineEquations;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λx ⇒ x ∈ Kr ∧ ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (λk ∈ r ⇒ mul (ring_negation K add (eta k)) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r))) (andI ((λk ∈ r ⇒ mul (ring_negation K add (eta k)) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r))) ∈ Kr) (∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i (λk ∈ r ⇒ mul (ring_negation K add (eta k)) (ring_inverse K add mul (eta r))) = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hAffineVector hAffineEquations));
end;
L256368
have h_s23_t11_affine_vs_homogeneous_reduction: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to {\exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}} \leftrightarrow {\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}}\);
proof from h_s23_t11_affine_solution_homogenizes, h_s23_t11_last_homogeneous_coordinate_nonzero, h_s23_t11_normalized_coordinates_solve_affine_system (42 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → ((∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ↔ ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add));
L256377L256378
let j; assume hj, hntr;
L256379
have hForward: \(\exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}} \to \exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}\);

statement: (∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) → ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add);
L256388
assume hExists;
L256389
apply hExists;
L256390L256391
let x; assume hxData;
L256392L256393
have hx: \({x} \in {{K}^{{r}}}\) by hxData;
formal
statement: x ∈ Kr;
proof term: exact (andEL (x ∈ Kr) (∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hxData);
L256400L256404
have hAffine: \(\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}\) by hxData;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r;
proof term: exact (andER (x ∈ Kr) (∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) hxData);
L256411L256416
have hHomogenized: \(\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta\left(r\right)} = {-{1_{{K}}}}}} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}\) by h_s23_t11_affine_solution_homogenizes from hj, hntr, hx, hAffine;
formal
statement: ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul) ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add);
proof term: exact (h_s23_t11_affine_solution_homogenizes j hj hntr x hx hAffine);
L256418
apply hHomogenized;
L256419L256420
let eta; assume hEtaData;
L256421L256422
have hEtaMember: \({eta} \in {{K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}}\) by hEtaData;
formal
statement: eta ∈ Kordsucc r;

L256429L256434
have hEtaBody: \({{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta\left(r\right)} = {-{1_{{K}}}}}} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}\) by hEtaData;
formal
statement: (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add);
proof term: exact (andER (eta ∈ Kordsucc r) ((homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hEtaData);
L256441L256443
have hHomogeneous: \({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0\) by hEtaBody;
formal
statement: homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta;
proof term: exact (andEL (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta) (eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (andEL (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta r = ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hEtaBody));
L256452L256453

formal
statement: eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add);

L256458
thus thesis by witness \(eta\) from hEtaMember, hHomogeneous, hEtaNonzero;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λeta ⇒ eta ∈ Kordsucc r ∧ (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add))) eta (andI (eta ∈ Kordsucc r) (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hEtaMember (andI (homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta) (eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hHomogeneous hEtaNonzero)));
end;
L256478
have hBackward: \(\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}} \to \exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}\);

formal
statement: eta r ≠ ring_zero K add;

L256522
thus thesis by h_s23_t11_normalized_coordinates_solve_affine_system from hj, hntr, hEtaMember, hHomogeneous, hEtaLastNonzero;
formal
exact (h_s23_t11_normalized_coordinates_solve_affine_system j hj hntr eta hEtaMember hHomogeneous hEtaLastNonzero);
end;
L256524
thus thesis by iffI from hForward, hBackward;
formal
exact (iffI (∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hForward hBackward);
end;
L256534
have h_s23_t11_reduced_rectangular_consistency: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to {\exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}} \leftrightarrow {{\det({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]})} = {0_{{K}}}}\);
proof from h_s23_t11_affine_vs_homogeneous_reduction, h_s23_t11_augmented_homogeneous_system (7 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → ((∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ↔ matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add);
L256542L256543
let j; assume hj, hntr;
L256544L256554
have hAffineHomogeneous: \({\exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{r}}}} \leftrightarrow {\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}}\) by h_s23_t11_affine_vs_homogeneous_reduction from hj, hntr;
formal
statement: ((∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) ↔ ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add));
proof term: exact (h_s23_t11_affine_vs_homogeneous_reduction j hj hntr);
L256555L256562
have hDeterminantHomogeneous: \({{\det({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]})} = {0_{{K}}}} \leftrightarrow {\exists eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0} \land {{eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}}}}\) by h_s23_t11_augmented_homogeneous_system from hj, hntr;
formal
statement: (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add ↔ ∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add));
proof term: exact (h_s23_t11_augmented_homogeneous_system j hj hntr);
L256563
thus thesis by iffI from hDeterminantHomogeneous, hAffineHomogeneous;
formal
exact (iffI (∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) (λhAffine ⇒ iffER (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hDeterminantHomogeneous (iffEL (∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hAffineHomogeneous hAffine)) (λhDeterminant ⇒ iffER (∃x ∈ Kr, ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i x = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i r) (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hAffineHomogeneous (iffEL (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) (∃eta ∈ Kordsucc r, homogeneous_linear_system_solution K add mul (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) eta ∧ eta ≠ (λi ∈ ordsucc r ⇒ ring_zero K add)) hDeterminantHomogeneous hDeterminant)));
end;
L256612L256613
have hFinalDivision: \(({K},{add},{mul})\text{ is a division ring}\) by field_division_ring from hField;
L256614L256615
have hFinalRing: \(({K},{add},{mul})\text{ is a ring}\) by division_ring_ring from hFinalDivision;
L256616L256617
have hFinalGroup: \(({K},{add})\text{ is a group}\) by ring_additive_group from hFinalRing;
L256618L256619
have hFinalZeroIn: \({0_{{K}}} \in {K}\) by group_identity_in from hFinalGroup;
L256620
have h_s23_t11_zero_extended_row_reduction: \(\forall x\in {K}^{{p}},\;\forall u\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall k\in r,\;{x\left(k\right)} = {u\left(k\right)} \to \forall k\in p,\;{k} \notin {r} \to {x\left(k\right)} = {0_{{K}}} \to \forall i\in n,\;{f_{{x}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{x}j}x_j} = {f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{u}j}x_j}\);
proof from hp, hFinalRing, hA, hrp, hr, hFinalGroup (33 steps)
statement: ∀x ∈ Kp, ∀u ∈ Kr, (∀k ∈ r, x k = u k) → (∀k ∈ p, k ∉ r → x k = ring_zero K add) → ∀i ∈ n, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i x = matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u;
L256627L256628L256629L256630L256631L256632
let x; assume hx; let u; assume hu, hSelectedValues, hFreeValues; let i; assume hi;
L256633L256634
have hFiniteP: \(\mathrm{finite}({p})\) by nat_finite from hp;
L256635L256636
have hComplementSubset: \({\left\{k\in p\mid {k} \notin {r}\right\}} \subseteq {p}\) by calculation;
formal
statement: {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} ⊆ p;
proof term: exact (λk hk ⇒ SepE1 p (λq ⇒ q ∉ r) k hk);
L256637L256638
have hFiniteComplement: \(\mathrm{finite}({\left\{k\in p\mid {k} \notin {r}\right\}})\) by Subq_finite from hFiniteP, hComplementSubset;
formal
statement: finite {k ∈ p|k ∉ r};
proof term: exact (Subq_finite p hFiniteP {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} hComplementSubset);
L256639
have hAllTerms: \(\forall k\in p,\;{mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)} \in {K}\);
proof from hFinalRing, hA, hi, hx (3 steps)
statement: ∀k ∈ p, mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k) ∈ K;
L256641L256642
let k; assume hk;
L256643
thus thesis by ring_multiplicative_law from hFinalRing, hA, hi, hk, hx;
formal
exact (god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul hFinalRing (matrix_entry A i k) (ap_Pi (n ⨯ p) (λz ⇒ K) A (i,k) hA (tuple_2_setprod n p i hi k hk)) (x k) (ap_Pi p (λz ⇒ K) x k hx hk));
end;
L256648L256655
have hSplit: \({\sum_{i\in {p}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {add\left(\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i,\sum_{i\in {\left\{k\in p\mid {k} \notin {r}\right\}}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i\right)}\) by ring_finite_sum_subset_complement from hFinalRing, hFiniteP, hrp, hAllTerms;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add p (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) = add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k))) (ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_subset_complement K add mul hFinalRing p hFiniteP r hrp (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) hAllTerms);
L256658L256662
have hSelectedSum: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},u\left(k\right)\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hr, hSelectedValues;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k)) (λk hk ⇒ f_eq_i (λvalue ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) value) (x k) (u k) (hSelectedValues k hk)));
L256667
have hComplementSum: \({\sum_{i\in {\left\{k\in p\mid {k} \notin {r}\right\}}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hFiniteComplement, hFreeValues, hFinalRing, hA, hi (3 steps)
statement: ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) = ring_zero K add;
L256670L256674
have hComplementCongruence: \({\sum_{i\in {\left\{k\in p\mid {k} \notin {r}\right\}}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},x\left(k\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{k\in p\mid {k} \notin {r}\right\}}}{\lambda k,\;0_{{K}}}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_finite from hFiniteComplement, hFreeValues, hFinalRing, hA, hi;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) = ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ ring_zero K add);
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_finite K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} hFiniteComplement (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) (λk ⇒ ring_zero K add) (λk hk ⇒ eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)) (mul (matrix_entry A i k) (ring_zero K add)) (ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λvalue ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) value) (x k) (ring_zero K add) (hFreeValues k (SepE1 p (λq ⇒ q ∉ r) k hk) (SepE2 p (λq ⇒ q ∉ r) k hk))) (god1_ring_zero_multiplication_right K add mul hFinalRing (matrix_entry A i k) (ap_Pi (n ⨯ p) (λz ⇒ K) A (i,k) hA (tuple_2_setprod n p i hi k (SepE1 p (λq ⇒ q ∉ r) k hk))))));
L256692
thus thesis by transitivity using abelian_finite_sum_zero from hComplementCongruence, hFinalRing, hFiniteComplement;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k))) (ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ ring_zero K add)) (ring_zero K add) hComplementCongruence (god1_abelian_finite_sum_zero K add (god1_ring_additive_abelian_group K add mul hFinalRing) {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} hFiniteComplement));
end;
L256701
have hSelectedSumIn: \({\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},u\left(k\right)\right)}_i} \in {K}\);
proof from hFinalRing, hA, hi, hrp, hu, hr (5 steps)
statement: ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k)) ∈ K;

proof from hFinalRing, hA, hi, hrp, hu (3 steps)
statement: ∀k ∈ r, mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k) ∈ K;
L256705L256706
let k; assume hk;
L256707
thus thesis by ring_multiplicative_law from hFinalRing, hA, hi, hrp, hk, hu;
formal
exact (god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul hFinalRing (matrix_entry A i k) (ap_Pi (n ⨯ p) (λz ⇒ K) A (i,k) hA (tuple_2_setprod n p i hi k (hrp k hk))) (u k) (ap_Pi r (λz ⇒ K) u k hu hk));
end;
L256712
thus thesis by ring_finite_sum_in_natural from hFinalRing, hr, hSelectedTerms;
formal
exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_in_natural K add mul hFinalRing r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k)) hSelectedTerms);
end;
L256714L256720
have hAddZero: \({add\left(\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},u\left(k\right)\right)}_i,0_{{K}}\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {r}}{\lambda k,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{k}},u\left(k\right)\right)}_i}\) by group_identity_specification from hFinalGroup, hSelectedSumIn;
formal
statement: add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) (ring_zero K add) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k));
proof term: exact (andEL (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) (ring_zero K add) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) (add (ring_zero K add) (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) = ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) ((andER (ring_zero K add ∈ K) (∀value ∈ K, add value (ring_zero K add) = value ∧ add (ring_zero K add) value = value) (god1_group_identity_specification K add hFinalGroup)) (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) hSelectedSumIn));
L256738
thus thesis by transitivity using binary_operation_congruence from hSplit, hSelectedSum, hComplementSum, hAddZero;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i x) (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k))) (ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)))) (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u) hSplit (eq_i_tra (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k))) (ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k)))) (add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) (ring_zero K add)) (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u) (god1_binary_operation_congruence add (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k))) (ring_finite_sum K add r (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k))) (ring_finite_sum K add {k ∈ p|k ∉ r} (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (x k))) (ring_zero K add) hSelectedSum hComplementSum) hAddZero));
end;
L256767
have h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_entry: \(\forall j\in n,\;\forall i\in r,\;\forall k\in r,\;{{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{i},{k}}} = {{A}_{{i},{k}}}\);
proof (13 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, ∀i ∈ r, ∀k ∈ r, matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k = matrix_entry A i k;
L256771L256772L256773L256774L256775L256776
let j; assume hj; let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;
L256777L256778
have hPair: \({\left(i,k\right)} \in {{{r} \cup \{{r}\}} \times {{r} \cup \{{r}\}}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hi, hk;
formal
statement: (i,k) ∈ ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) i (ordsuccI1 r i hi) k (ordsuccI1 r k hk));
L256780L256781
have hFirst: \({\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(0\right)} \in {r}\) by substitution from hi;
formal
statement: (i,k) 0 ∈ r;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL r i ((i,k) 0) (tuple_2_0_eq i k) hi);
L256782L256783
have hSecond: \({\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(1\right)} \in {r}\) by substitution from hk;
formal
statement: (i,k) 1 ∈ r;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL r k ((i,k) 1) (tuple_2_1_eq i k) hk);
L256784
thus thesis by transitivity from hPair, hFirst, hSecond;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (if (i,k) 0 ∈ r then if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1) else b ((i,k) 0) else if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1) else b j) (matrix_entry A i k) (beta (ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r) (λu ⇒ if u 0 ∈ r then if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0) else if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j (u 1) else b j) (i,k) hPair) (eq_i_tra (if (i,k) 0 ∈ r then if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1) else b ((i,k) 0) else if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1) else b j) (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A i k) (eq_i_tra (if (i,k) 0 ∈ r then if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1) else b ((i,k) 0) else if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1) else b j) (if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1) else b ((i,k) 0)) (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1)) (If_i_1 ((i,k) 0 ∈ r) (if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1) else b ((i,k) 0)) (if (i,k) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1) else b j) hFirst) (If_i_1 ((i,k) 1 ∈ r) (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1)) (b ((i,k) 0)) hSecond)) (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A i ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A i k) (f_eq_i (λrow ⇒ matrix_entry A row ((i,k) 1)) ((i,k) 0) i (tuple_2_0_eq i k)) (f_eq_i (λcol ⇒ matrix_entry A i col) ((i,k) 1) k (tuple_2_1_eq i k)))));
end;

formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) r r) (if (r,r) 0 ∈ r then if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((r,r) 0) ((r,r) 1) else b ((r,r) 0) else if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((r,r) 1) else b j) (b j) (beta (ordsucc r ⨯ ordsucc r) (λu ⇒ if u 0 ∈ r then if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1) else b (u 0) else if u 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j (u 1) else b j) (r,r) hPair) (eq_i_tra (if (r,r) 0 ∈ r then if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((r,r) 0) ((r,r) 1) else b ((r,r) 0) else if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((r,r) 1) else b j) (if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((r,r) 1) else b j) (b j) (If_i_0 ((r,r) 0 ∈ r) (if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A ((r,r) 0) ((r,r) 1) else b ((r,r) 0)) (if (r,r) 1 ∈ r then matrix_entry A j ((r,r) 1) else b j) hFirstOutside) (If_i_0 ((r,r) 1 ∈ r) (matrix_entry A j ((r,r) 1)) (b j) hSecondOutside)));

have h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_row: \(\forall j\in n,\;\forall i\in r,\;\forall u\in {K}^{{r}},\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{u}j}x_j} = {f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{u}j}x_j}\);
proof from hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_entry (7 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, ∀i ∈ r, ∀u ∈ Kr, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i u = matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u;
L257016L257017L257018L257019L257020L257021
let j; assume hj; let i; assume hi; let u; assume hu;

thus thesis by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_entry, hj, hi;
formal
exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (u k)) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i k) (u k)) (λk hk ⇒ f_eq_i (λvalue ⇒ mul value (u k)) (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) i k) (matrix_entry A i k) (h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_entry j hj i hi k hk)));
end;
L257030
have h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_row: \(\forall j\in n,\;\forall u\in {K}^{{r}},\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{r}_{{u}j}x_j} = {f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{j}_{{u}j}x_j}\);
proof from hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_entry (5 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, ∀u ∈ Kr, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) r u = matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A j u;
L257035L257036L257037L257038
let j; assume hj; let u; assume hu;
L257039
thus thesis by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hr, h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_entry, hj;
formal
exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add r hr (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) r k) (u k)) (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j k) (u k)) (λk hk ⇒ f_eq_i (λvalue ⇒ mul value (u k)) (matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) r k) (matrix_entry A j k) (h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_entry j hj k hk)));
end;
L257047
have h_s23_t11_reduced_affine_characterization: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to \forall u\in {K}^{{r}},\;{\forall q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{q}_{{u}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{q},{r}}}} \leftrightarrow {{\forall i\in r,\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{u}j}x_j} = {b\left(i\right)}} \land {{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{j}_{{u}j}x_j} = {b\left(j\right)}}}\);
proof from h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_row, h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_rhs, h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_row, h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_rhs (28 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → ∀u ∈ Kr, ((∀q ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q u = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q r) ↔ (∀i ∈ r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u = b i) ∧ matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A j u = b j);
L257056L257057L257058L257059
let j; assume hj, hjOutside; let u; assume hu;
L257060
have hForward: \(\forall q\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{q}_{{u}j}x_j} = {{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}_{{q},{r}}} \to {\forall i\in r,\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{u}j}x_j} = {b\left(i\right)}} \land {{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{j}_{{u}j}x_j} = {b\left(j\right)}}\);
proof from h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_row, hj, hu, h_s23_t11_augmented_prefix_rhs, h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_row, h_s23_t11_augmented_extra_rhs (8 steps)
statement: (∀q ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q u = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q r) → (∀i ∈ r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u = b i) ∧ matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A j u = b j;
L257068
assume hAffine;
L257069
have hPrefix: \(\forall i\in r,\;{f_{{u}}(x)=\sum_j{i}_{{u}j}x_j} = {b\left(i\right)}\);

statement: ∀i ∈ r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u = b i;
L257071L257072
let i; assume hi;

have h_s23_t11_leading_entry: \(\forall i\in r,\;\forall k\in r,\;{{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}_{{i},{k}}} = {{A}_{{i},{k}}}\);
proof (5 steps)
statement: ∀i ∈ r, ∀k ∈ r, matrix_entry (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) i k = matrix_entry A i k;

let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;
L257194
thus thesis by transitivity from hi, hk;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) i k) (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A i k) (beta (r ⨯ r) (λu ⇒ matrix_entry A (u 0) (u 1)) (i,k) (tuple_2_setprod r r i hi k hk)) (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A i ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A i k) (f_eq_i (λrow ⇒ matrix_entry A row ((i,k) 1)) ((i,k) 0) i (tuple_2_0_eq i k)) (f_eq_i (λcol ⇒ matrix_entry A i col) ((i,k) 1) k (tuple_2_1_eq i k))));
end;

end;

statement: (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∈ Kr;

have h_s23_t11_canonical_reduced_data: \({\exists!x,{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}x={\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}} \land {{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}{{{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}^{-1}}{\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}}={\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}}\) by invertible_square_matrix_unique_solution_and_formula from hr, h_s23_t11_leading_matrix_in, hFinalDivision, h_s23_t11_leading_system_invertible, h_s23_t11_restricted_rhs_in;
formal
statement: linear_system_unique_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∧ linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i));
proof term: exact (god1_invertible_square_matrix_unique_solution_and_formula K add mul r hr (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) h_s23_t11_leading_matrix_in (god1_division_ring_ring K add mul hFinalDivision) h_s23_t11_leading_system_invertible (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) h_s23_t11_restricted_rhs_in);
L257370
have h_s23_t11_canonical_reduced_exists: \(\exists u0\in {K}^{{r}},\;{\exists!x,{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}x={\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}} \land {{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}{u0}={\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}}\);

statement: ∃u0 ∈ Kr, linear_system_unique_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∧ linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) u0;
L257377L257384
have hCanonicalSolution: \({{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}{{{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}^{-1}}{\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}}={\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}\) by h_s23_t11_canonical_reduced_data;

statement: linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i));

L257396L257402
have hCanonicalMember: \({{{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}^{-1}}{\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}} \in {{K}^{{r}}}\) by hCanonicalSolution;
formal
statement: matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∈ Kr;
proof term: exact (andER (linear_system K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i)) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∈ Kr) (andEL (linear_system K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∧ matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∈ Kr) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i)) = (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i)) hCanonicalSolution));
L257426
thus thesis by witness \({{{A}[{\lambda q,\;q},{\lambda q,\;q}]}^{-1}}{\lambda i\in r,\;b\left(i\right)}\) from hCanonicalMember, h_s23_t11_canonical_reduced_data;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λu0 ⇒ u0 ∈ Kr ∧ (linear_system_unique_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∧ linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) u0)) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i)) (andI (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∈ Kr) (linear_system_unique_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) ∧ linear_system_solution K add mul r r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i) (matrix_vector_product K add mul r r (matrix_inverse K add mul r (matrix_submatrix r r (λq ⇒ q) (λq ⇒ q) A)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ b i))) hCanonicalMember h_s23_t11_canonical_reduced_data));
end;
L257454
have hFinalForward: \(\exists x\in {K}^{{p}},\;{A}{x}={b} \to \forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to {\det({[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]})} = {0_{{K}}}\);

assume hExists;
L257461L257464

apply hZeroFreeExists;

formal
statement: x ∈ Kp;

formal
statement: linear_system_solution K add mul n p A b x;

statement: ∀k ∈ p, k ∉ r → x k = ring_zero K add;

formal
statement: matrix_vector_product K add mul n p A x = b;

statement: ∀i ∈ n, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i x = b i;

exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i x) (matrix_vector_product K add mul n p A x i) (b i) (eq_sym (matrix_vector_product K add mul n p A x i) (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i x) (beta n (λq ⇒ ring_finite_sum K add p (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A q k) (x k))) i hi)) (f_eq_i (λvalue ⇒ value i) (matrix_vector_product K add mul n p A x) b hxProduct));
end;

statement: (λk ∈ r ⇒ x k) ∈ Kr;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi r (λk ⇒ K) (λk ⇒ x k) (λk hk ⇒ ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ K) x k hx (hrp k hk)));
L257512L257514
have hSelectedX: \(\forall k\in r,\;{x\left(k\right)} = {\left(\lambda q\in r,\;x\left(q\right)\right)\left(k\right)}\) by symmetry;
formal
statement: ∀k ∈ r, x k = (λq ∈ r ⇒ x q) k;
proof term: exact (λk hk ⇒ eq_sym ((λq ∈ r ⇒ x q) k) (x k) (beta r (λq ⇒ x q) k hk));

statement: ∃u ∈ Kr, ∀q ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q u = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q r;

thus thesis by h_s23_t11_reduced_rectangular_consistency, hj, hjOutside, hAffineExists;
formal
exact (iffEL (∃u ∈ Kr, ∀q ∈ ordsucc r, matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q u = matrix_entry (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) q r) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) (h_s23_t11_reduced_rectangular_consistency j hj hjOutside) hAffineExists);

thus thesis by transitivity from h_s23_t11_zero_extended_row_reduction, hExtendedCanonical, hu0, hExtendedSelected, hExtendedFree, hi, hAllReducedRows;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i (λk ∈ p ⇒ if k ∈ r then u0 k else ring_zero K add)) (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul r A i u0) (b i) (h_s23_t11_zero_extended_row_reduction (λk ∈ p ⇒ if k ∈ r then u0 k else ring_zero K add) hExtendedCanonical u0 hu0 hExtendedSelected hExtendedFree i hi) (hAllReducedRows i hi));
end;

have hExtendedProductIn: \({{A}{\lambda k\in p,\;\operatorname{if}\;{k} \in {r}\;\operatorname{then}\;u0\left(k\right)\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}} \in {{K}^{{n}}}\) by matrix_vector_product_in from hFinalRing, hn, hp, hA, hExtendedCanonical;
formal
statement: matrix_vector_product K add mul n p A (λk ∈ p ⇒ if k ∈ r then u0 k else ring_zero K add) ∈ Kn;
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_vector_product_in K add mul hFinalRing n hn p hp A hA (λk ∈ p ⇒ if k ∈ r then u0 k else ring_zero K add) hExtendedCanonical);

apply extensionality from hExtendedProductIn, hb;

formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_vector_product K add mul n p A (λk ∈ p ⇒ if k ∈ r then u0 k else ring_zero K add) i) (matrix_row_linear_form K add mul p A i (λk ∈ p ⇒ if k ∈ r then u0 k else ring_zero K add)) (b i) (beta n (λq ⇒ ring_finite_sum K add p (λk ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A q k) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ if h ∈ r then u0 h else ring_zero K add) k))) i hi) (hExtendedRows i hi));
end;

formal

thus thesis by iffI from hFinalForward, hFinalBackward;
formal
exact (iffI (∃x ∈ Kp, linear_system_solution K add mul n p A b x) (∀j ∈ n, j ∉ r → matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc r) (augmented_consistency_matrix r A b j) = ring_zero K add) hFinalForward hFinalBackward);

h_s23_t11_s19_theorem5_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall M0,\;\forall \mathsf{addM0},\mathsf{smulR0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall n0,r0\in \omega,\;\forall f0:set \to set,\;\forall \mathsf{rho0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall \mathsf{beta0}\in {K0}^{{n0}},\;{M0}\text{ is a right }{K0}\text{-vector space} \to {r0} \subseteq {n0} \to {f0}_i\text{ are linearly independent} \to \forall j\in n0,\;{j} \notin {r0} \to \forall k\in r0,\;{\mathsf{rho0}\left(j,k\right)} \in {K0} \to \forall j\in n0,\;{j} \notin {r0} \to {f0\left(j\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {r0}}{\lambda k,\;(\lambda f)(x)=\lambda f(x)}_i} \to {{\exists x\in M0,\;\forall i\in n0,\;{f0\left(i,x\right)} = {\mathsf{beta0}\left(i\right)}} \leftrightarrow {\forall j\in n0,\;{j} \notin {r0} \to {\mathsf{beta0}\left(j\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {r0}}{\lambda k,\;\mathsf{mul0}\left(\mathsf{rho0}\left(j,k\right),\mathsf{beta0}\left(k\right)\right)}_i}}} \land {\forall j\in n0,\;{j} \notin {r0} \to {\mathsf{beta0}\left(j\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {r0}}{\lambda k,\;\mathsf{mul0}\left(\mathsf{rho0}\left(j,k\right),\mathsf{beta0}\left(k\right)\right)}_i} \to {\left\{x\in M0\mid \forall i\in n0,\;{f0\left(i,x\right)} = {\mathsf{beta0}\left(i\right)}\right\}} = {\left\{x\in M0\mid \forall i\in r0,\;{f0\left(i,x\right)} = {\mathsf{beta0}\left(i\right)}\right\}}}\) by s19_theorem5_consistency_of_dependent_linear_equations (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_s20_theorem2_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall m0\in \omega,\;\forall B0\in M_{{m0}}({K0}),\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a division ring} \to {{\exists x\in {K0}^{{m0}},\;{{B0}{x}=0} \land {{x} \neq {\lambda i\in m0,\;0_{{K0}}}}} \leftrightarrow {\neg {{B0}\in\operatorname{GL}({m0},{K0})}}} \land {{{B0}\text{ is a Cramer system}} \leftrightarrow {{B0}\in\operatorname{GL}({m0},{K0})}}\) by s20_theorem2_singularity_and_cramer_interfaces (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_theorem8_corollary4_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall m0\in \omega,\;\forall B0\in M_{{m0}}({K0}),\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a field} \to {{B0}\text{ is a Cramer system}} \leftrightarrow {{\det({B0})} \neq {0_{{K0}}}}\) by s23_theorem8_corollary4_cramer_determinant_criterion (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_zero_free_variables_equivalence: \({\exists y\in {K}^{{p}},\;{A}{y}={b}} \leftrightarrow {\exists x\in {K}^{{p}},\;{{A}{x}={b}} \land {\forall k\in p,\;{k} \notin {r} \to {x\left(k\right)} = {0_{{K}}}}}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_theorem8_corollary3_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall m0\in \omega,\;\forall B0\in M_{{m0}}({K0}),\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a field} \to {\exists x\in {K0}^{{m0}},\;{{B0}{x}=0} \land {{x} \neq {\lambda i\in m0,\;0_{{K0}}}}} \leftrightarrow {{\det({B0})} = {0_{{K0}}}}\) by s23_theorem8_corollary3_homogeneous_square_system (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_zero_last_coordinate_gives_leading_kernel: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to \forall eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{[A_{1..r,1..r}\mid b;A_{{j},1..r}\mid b_{{j}}]}{eta}=0 \to {eta} \neq {\lambda i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;0_{{K}}} \to {eta\left(r\right)} = {0_{{K}}} \to \exists z\in {K}^{{r}},\;{{{A}[{\lambda i,\;i},{\lambda k,\;k}]}{z}=0} \land {{z} \neq {\lambda i\in r,\;0_{{K}}}}\) by h_s23_t11_zero_last_coordinate_gives_leading_kernel_core (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_theorem8_corollary3_second_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall m0\in \omega,\;\forall B0\in M_{{m0}}({K0}),\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a field} \to {\exists x\in {K0}^{{m0}},\;{{B0}{x}=0} \land {{x} \neq {\lambda i\in m0,\;0_{{K0}}}}} \leftrightarrow {{\det({B0})} = {0_{{K0}}}}\) by s23_theorem8_corollary3_homogeneous_square_system (unused helper);
h_s23_t11_normalize_nontrivial_homogeneous_solution: \(\forall j\in n,\;{j} \notin {r} \to \forall eta\in {K}^{{{r} \cup \{{r}\}}},\;{eta\left(r\right)} \neq {0_{{K}}} \to \exists x\in {K}^{{r}},\;\forall i\in r,\;{x\left(i\right)} = {mul\left(eta\left(i\right),{eta\left(r\right)}^{-1}\right)}\) proof folded (unused helper);
∎
